meta.title: Kyronet - Your IT partner
meta.description: Kyronet is your IT partner for designing secure, high-performance, and scalable infrastructures.

hero.title: Your IT infrastructure, our expertise
hero.subtitle: We design, deploy, and manage tailored IT systems to move your business forward.
hero.videoFallback: Your browser does not support the video tag.

about.p1: We design and manage modern IT ecosystems—including networks, virtualization, and secure cloud platforms—for organizations that demand reliability and performance.
about.p2: From network architecture to disaster recovery, we ensure continuity, scalability, and security at every layer of your information system.

services.intro: A structured approach to design and operate modern infrastructures.

items.title: Endpoint & workstation fleet
items.description: Full lifecycle management of your devices, rollout, and continuous monitoring.

items.title: Managed services & support
items.description: Proactive maintenance and technical assistance to keep your services running.

items.title: Networking & cybersecurity
items.description: Advanced protection and hardening for business-critical systems.

items.title: Virtualization & cloud
items.description: Migration and operations for scalable, high-performance cloud environments.

items.title: Backup & disaster recovery
items.description: Backup strategies and fast recovery when incidents occur.

items.title: Development & databases
items.description: Custom applications and optimized management of business data.

items.title: Training & enablement
items.description: Upskilling your teams and hands-on operational support.

items.title: HOOM
items.description: HOOM is an innovative learning platform that helps students revise with interactive quizzes, past papers, course summaries, and smart AI assistance.

items.title: HotelPro
items.description: HotelPro is a full hotel management platform for reservations, rooms, billing, restaurant, and accounting.

process.intro: From strategic analysis to continuous monitoring, every step aims for a reliable, scalable, high-performance infrastructure.

steps.title: Audit & analysis
steps.description: We assess your existing infrastructure, identify improvements, and clarify your requirements.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We design a tailored architecture aligned with your processes and business goals.

steps.title: Deployment
steps.description: Progressive rollout with rigorous testing and team training.

steps.title: Ongoing support
steps.description: 24/7 supervision, preventive maintenance, and continuous optimization.

testimonials.subtitle: Organizations that trust us with their critical infrastructure.

items.name: Sarah Johnson
items.text: Outstanding technical expertise. Their approach completely transformed our IT infrastructure.

items.name: Michael Brown
items.text: Reliability, performance, and security. The team delivered a robust, scalable architecture.

items.name: David Martin
items.text: A true strategic partner. They understand both business and technical challenges.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our IT services.

items.question: What are your response times?
items.answer: We provide 24/7 coverage with under 15 minutes response for critical incidents.

items.question: Do you offer a free audit?
items.answer: Yes, we perform a full, free infrastructure audit with a detailed report and concrete recommendations.

items.question: How do you ensure security?
items.answer: We use Zero Trust principles, advanced firewalls, encryption, and continuous monitoring across systems.

items.question: Which technologies do you work with?
items.answer: VMware, Kubernetes, Cisco, Fortinet, AWS, Azure, plus custom solutions in Python, PHP, and Go.

items.question: Are backups secure?
items.answer: Yes, we follow the 3-2-1 rule with immutable backups and regular restore testing.

contact.intro: We design secure, high-performance, scalable IT infrastructures for modern businesses.
